---

# Redington
is aimed at players who enjoy PvP. I've dedicated a considerable amount of time to crafting this pack, and I'll continue to update it by adding new textures and creating fresh designs specifically for this pack. Makeing this pack has been a Lot of Fun, and I hope you enjoy it as much as I do.



---
